title: PM Modi Italy visit LIVE: PM visits Colosseum, gifts Melody to Meloni in candid meet; key talks later today
description: PM Modi Italy visit LIVE: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is in Italy, a visit that is part of his five-nation tour and kickstarted with a warm welcome by his Italian counterpart Giorgia Meloni. PM's tour, spanning UAE, Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, and Italy, began on May 15 and concludes today.
